zh: 专为大力冲球设计，硬度和弹性最优平衡
Power Break 前节加强硬度，传力更高效
重心靠后设计，冲球发力更顺畅
防滑握把设计，大力击球不脱手
en: Designed specifically for powerful breaks with optimal stiffness-flex balance
Power Break shaft with enhanced hardness for efficient power transfer
Rear-weighted balance point for smoother break stroke
Non-slip grip design prevents slipping on hard strokes

suitable_for.zh: 需要一根专业冲杆的进阶玩家。冲球频率高、打比赛需要稳定开球表现的选手。
suitable_for.en: Advanced players who need a dedicated break cue. Players who break frequently and need consistent break performance in tournaments.

review.zh: Mezz Power Break 是市面上口碑最好的冲杆之一。跟打杆追求手感不同，冲杆核心就是'传力效率'——把你的力量尽可能多地传递到母球上。Power Break 的前节硬度比普通打杆高很多，击球时几乎没有形变，能量损失极小。后把重心靠后的设计让你在大力挥杆时更容易保持直线运动。如果你现在用打杆冲球，换一根专业冲杆后会明显感觉散球效果提升。
review.en: The Mezz Power Break is one of the most highly regarded break cues available. Unlike playing cues that prioritize feel, break cues focus on 'power transfer efficiency' — delivering maximum force to the cue ball. The Power Break shaft has significantly higher stiffness than regular playing shafts, minimizing deformation and energy loss on impact. The rear-weighted butt design helps maintain straight-line motion during powerful strokes. If you're currently breaking with your playing cue, switching to a dedicated break cue will noticeably improve your spread.
